message:
I am thinking...: I have successfully created the core files for the restaurant management application. Based on the scratchpad and the recent tool outputs, I have:
1. Created `package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `next.config.js`, `prisma/schema.prisma`.
2. Created `src/app/layout.tsx`, `src/app/page.tsx`, `src/app/globals.css`, `src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts`.
3. Created `src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts`, `src/app/api/menu/route.ts`, `src/app/api/orders/route.ts`, `src/app/dashboard/page.tsx`.
4. Created `src/app/menu/page.tsx`, `src/app/orders/page.tsx`, `src/app/auth/login/page.tsx`, `src/app/auth/register/page.tsx`.
5. Created `src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx`, `src/components/OrderTable.tsx`, `src/middleware.ts`, `.env.example`.
6. Created `src/components/Navbar.tsx`, `src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx`.
7. Created `src/lib/prisma.ts`, `src/lib/auth.ts`.

All files listed in the requirements have been created. I will now perform a final check of the file structure to ensure everything is in place and then signal completion.
